content.en:
"Finally breaking through the eighteen-dimensional realm, the next step is to become a powerhouse!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he took a look at the other eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses of Hengyuan Gate, and when he saw that they were quite honest, he left directly.

After Ye Tian left, the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse of Hengyuan Gate breathed a sigh of relief.

"Who the hell is this, so powerful!"

"I don't know, it's a very strange powerhouse, but it will definitely become a polarizing powerhouse in the future!"

"Fortunately, such strong people don't kill much, otherwise our Hengyuan Gate will be a thing of the past!"

......

After reaching the eighteenth dimensional realm, Ye Tian knew that if he wanted to continue to break through, it was not something that ordinary chances could do.

"You must go to the Divine Domain!"

Ye Tian knew very well that only the Divine Dimension Domain had the secret of breaking through the Ultimate Strong, and if he studied it slowly, it would take too long to break through the Ultimate Strong.

And so this day.

Ye Tian took some elites of Tianwei Pavilion to go to the Divine Dimension Domain to develop, maybe it would be a little difficult in the early stage, but as long as he got a foothold there, Tianwei Pavilion would gradually grow stronger, which would still help him.

As soon as they heard that they were going to the Divine Dimension Domain, many members of the Tianwei Pavilion were extremely excited, after all, it was the real core of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and it was a general existence of the Divine Dimension, and everyone wanted to go.

It's just that the halfway from the Xuantian Domain to the Divine Dimension Domain is too far, and I don't know how many dangerous places I have passed through in the middle, and I will even encounter some strong people's interceptions.

Therefore, even the powerhouses of the fifteenth dimension did not dare to cross the void to go to the Divine Dimension Domain.

But now that Ye Tian is leading the way, they are not afraid.

Soon.

Ye Tian arranged it and took hundreds of members of the Tianwei Pavilion to the Divine Dimension Domain.

Time passed, they kept hurrying, and some small troubles encountered on the way, which were all solved by Ye Tian.

And an eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse is enough to deter some juniors, but he hasn't encountered too much trouble.

After a long time.

The Divine Dimension has arrived!

Ye Tian did not go directly to the core area of the Divine Dimension Domain, but found a giant city in a marginal area to settle down.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian bought an area as the new residence of Tianwei Pavilion, and then he knew the information of the Divine Dimension Domain, he still had too much to know about here.

In addition, he also asked the members of the Tianwei Pavilion to buy and inquire about the information, and then gather the information.

Not long after, Ye Tian had some understanding of the Divine Dimension Domain.

The Divine Dimension Domain is very large, hundreds of times larger than the Xuantian Domain, and there are many forces here, the most powerful of which is the Thirteen Heavenly Sect.

These thirteen heavenly sects all have strong people who have truly completed the ultimate transformation, and these strong people who have completed the ultimate are called the ultimate masters.

And there are also a lot of ultimate powerhouses, and there are quite a few of them.

However, almost all of those Ultimate Lords who have completed the Ultimate Dimension are not in the Divine Dimension Domain, and it is said that they have all left the Divine Power Heaven and Earth and gone to the Dimensional Sea.

"The Ultimate Lord should have mastered the existence of the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move, but it should still not reach the level of the Ultimate Realm Lord. "

"However, the Ultimate Lord's physical body should be much stronger than the physical body of the Nine Realms, plus after entering the Dimensional Sea, they can also take other paths and master other powers, not just the Divine Dimensional Body, and their strength will have a earth-shaking change in a short period of time. Therefore, those ultimate lords want to stay in the sea of dimensions, not the gods and the earth. "

That's his guess.

But he didn't know exactly how powerful the Nine Realms that had mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move were.

For example, if he has mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move, after returning, he will also have a way to condense the body of the divine dimension and make the physical body stronger again, and he will definitely not be weaker than the ultimate master, right?

Of course.

No one knows how many Ultimate Lords there are in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, maybe there are still beings comparable to the Ultimate Realm Lords!

However, this is unlikely.

If there really was an Ultimate Realm Master, then the Void Heaven Palace would not dare to descend to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, otherwise it would definitely be discovered.

In addition to the Twelve Heavenly Sects, there are also some forces that also have Ultimate Powers, but they do not have Ultimate Masters.

In short, there are really many extreme powerhouses in the Divine Dimension Domain.

......

God's Domain.

Ye Tian met with an eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse.

This eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse comes from a powerful force, and this force has three ultimate powerhouses.

When Ye Tian met with the other party, he was buying the ultimate information in the other party's hand, and the other party offered a very high price, but he was also willing to buy it.

There are quite a few eighteen-dimensional powerhouses who sell this kind of Ultimate Polarization data, and these eighteen-dimensional powerhouses all want to impact the Ultimate, so they will do whatever it takes to collect resources to improve their strength.

"Li Huanye, where is your information?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This is!" Li Huanye took out a stack of materials, "What about the resources!"

"Give!"

Ye Tian took out a small Void Dimension object, this treasure alone was worth a lot of money, and there were a lot of resources inside it, all of which he had collected in the past.

Li Huanye sensed it with his spiritual power, and nodded with satisfaction, "Very good, then let's trade!"

After the transaction, the two separated.

Li Huanye didn't think about intercepting and killing Ye Tian, after all, if he could cultivate to the eighteenth dimension, no one was sure that he would defeat the other party, and he couldn't move the ultimate powerhouse!

As for inviting a few more eighteen-dimensional people to do this, there is also a risk of exposure, and it is not worth it.

Ye Tian took 270 to the information given by Li Huanye, but he didn't immediately believe it, he traded with another eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse and compared the two pieces of information.

"There is no error in the information, it seems that these eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses do not dare to fool people, otherwise if they are exposed, they will offend the existence of the same level, and it is indeed not worth it. "

Ye Tian went back, and then studied these materials.

According to the information, if the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse wants to break through to the ultimate powerhouse, he can't blindly temper his body, and there is no way to break through by doing so.

If the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse tempers the body to a certain extent, it will not be able to continue refining, and the body will fall into the shackles of a bottleneck, unable to make any progress.

At this time, it is necessary to make the spiritual power extreme, that is, to let the spiritual power and the power of the divine dimension be integrated, so that the spiritual power can leap and have a trace of ultimate attributes, that is, the ultimate spiritual power.

After the spiritual power is broken through, the ultimate spiritual power after the transformation is used to affect the body, so as to achieve the ultimate perfection of the body.

This is the breakthrough route of the way of the divine dimension researched by the divine dimension heaven and earth.

However, it is extremely difficult to merge the spiritual power with the power of the divine dimension, and the corresponding secret method must be mastered in order to have any hope of breaking through.

And different eighteen dimensions,The corresponding secret method is also different.,Only the self-created secret method can help you break through.,Use other secret methods to try to break through.,The failure rate is too great.,But there is also a success rate.,It's just that the success rate is too low.。。
